name: 7q11_23_Williams_Beuren_duplication
description: 7q11.23 duplication syndrome (Som-Williams syndrome) — reciprocal microduplication of the Williams-Beuren critical region (~1.5 Mb). Mediated by NAHR between the same direct-orientation Williams-Beuren-LCRs (centromeric, medial, telomeric) of >97% identity that cause the canonical deletion. Phenotype: expressive language delay, autism, anxiety, attention disorders, cardiac defects (TGA, aortic dilatation).

architecture.internal_structure: Three Williams-Beuren LCR blocks of ~300-400 kb at >98% identity (GTF2IP1/POM121/NSUN5 paralog cassettes); unique core contains ELN, GTF2I, GTF2IRD1, LIMK1, CLIP2, BAZ1B, BCL7B, STX1A. Same architecture as the deletion locus.
